item.title: Imgur !
item.description: I've been fighting with imgur all moring. A file is too large to up load. Its a 15 second file ? How is it too large ? I reformatted the file. Still to large. I try other files I'd loaded before those files are also too large. If this loads I'm a shit my self Edit: aaaaaaahhhhhhhhhh *$&@>$;$,@(#<$;@('>what ! I had to use web mode on my phone to upload -_- what's going on imgur ? Are you limiting my post ? Was there a complaint ?

item.title: Memes favor the literate
item.description:
What happened to the car? Did they get it cleaned?
Corvid haters are not welcome here.
"I'm Merry *brrrp* Poppins, Quill! And also a pickle!"
Technically correct.
You generally shouldn't listen to what the boss says about unions but this is an exception.
Thrawn is a neat character. "I want to understand and appreciate the many diverse cultures of the galaxy which I'm helping to dominate."
For legal reasons this is a joke. For your own safety, keep an eye on the road.
DS9 is the best trek because it has such a deep bench of characters. Morn doesn't even talk and we all remember him. Other treks are lucky when they have a villain as good as Eddington but DS9 also has Wynn and Dukat.
Captain, I am picking up breakfast readings at twice the normal level.
It's Wednesday somewhere
Worth the risk.
In order: cute animals, cool fantasy scene, me at any given time
This shouldn't really come as a surprise to anyone.
Flesh and Blood TCG tax.
item.dc:creator: BenjyX55

item.title: Pollinators unite!
item.description: im sick of grass, im sick of the mowing and all the mowing everyone does is pretty bad for the environment. this stuff is also called mini clover. its good for pollinators and doesnt need mowing very much. not sure if its gonna take over completely or not but the few small patches i already had dont have any grass in them and look so pretty and so green.
item.dc:creator: Stressicca

item.title: Sock hair [OC]
item.description:
It only took me 27 years to figure out how to tame my unmanageable hair… I just need a sock! All it took was a flippin’ sock!! So for any of you struggling, I bestow upon you, the knowledge of the hair sock <3 I would add a selfie for reference, but I would likely be sent into orbit for doing so! However if you must see the results, I added an IRL picture to the gram over here: https://www.instagram.com/p/DJm1mCzoPvB/?igsh=Y21uMmE4NjRicm8=
Cat tax! Ms. Beany is lookin’ for snacks! Seems like she’s found one (you <3)
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: In October 1991,86-year-old oil tycoon was wheeled into a Houston strip club, where he fell in love with a woman who was working the day shift. The octogenarian's name was J. Howard Marshall, and he was worth over $1 billion.
item.description: In October 1991, an 86-year-old oil tycoon was wheeled into a Houston strip club, where he fell in love with a woman who was working the day shift. The octogenarian's name was J. Howard Marshall, and he was worth over $1 billion. And the woman was Anna Nicole Smith, a 23-year-old aspiring model. The two were reportedly smitten at first sight, and the very next day, Marshall gave Smith an envelope with $1,000 in cash and told her, "Don't go to work, my Lady Love. You don't have to ever go back to work." The rest was history. Marshall showered Smith with expensive gifts, including a red Mercedes convertible, access to a bungalow that had once belonged to Marilyn Monroe, and over $1 million worth of jewelry. And shortly after Smith found fame as a Playboy model, the pair married in 1994 — but their wedded bliss lasted just 14 months before Marshall died.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: i stole these memes because they remind me of my book character (dale)
item.description: free ebook at rarust.com bruh, i just today saw my first two reviews, and if i wasn't such a numb bastard i would have cried, man. i really expected people to either hate it or ignore it, and maybe these two were flukes and it really will be hated, but man i'm just so glad someone other than me and my close friends liked it. poured my big dumb heart into this big dumb book, and it's nice that it was worth all the blood, sweat, and tears. <3
item.dc:creator: rarust

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
This foundation is severely deteriorated. This type of deterioration often traces back to older construction practices where some builders used beach sand in their concrete mixes, introducing high levels of salt.
This is a clear example of severe wood rot caused by prolonged moisture exposure. What makes this especially concerning is how easily this kind of damage can go unnoticed until it affects the structure's stability. Early detection is key to avoiding more invasive repairs.
Moisture intrusion is evident with efflorescence forming on this internal stem wall. Not only is this foundation showing signs of water damage, but the brick foundation on the right doesn't meet current building codes. As unreinforced masonry, it is vulnerable to damage during earthquakes, posing a significant safety risk.
In another area of the crawlspace, you can see additional signs of deterioration consisting of rusting steel plates, concrete in poor conditions, and more water damage throughout the foundation.
Plants were growing right next to this foundation and eventually made their way into the crawlspace. This is why it’s important to be mindful when planting trees and vegetation near your home as they can cause structural problems over time.
This foundation has a ton of spall damage. Spalling is the process where concrete begins to break and flake off, typically caused by moisture intrusion.
As the water seeps into the concrete, it can weaken the material, leading to cracks, crumbling, and exposed rebar. This not only affects the foundation's strength but can also result in further structural damage if left unaddressed, due to its likeliness of spreading.
This foundation was likely blown out to accommodate for plumbing or electrical systems to run through it. As a result, there is now no proper support for the home.
Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! We've noticed that a lot of you ask to show how we repair the damage we find. We just completed a full project walkthrough of this failing retaining wall and how we replaced it. Check it out here if you're interested: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9N8r3ZgCBrk
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Mermay day 13, Fig! [OC]
item.description:
Here is the amazing fig mermaid for day 13 of mermay! I’m over the moon with her colour scheme ;D
And tomorrow we will have completed week two of mermay!! Papaya is going to be an absolute blast, I think I’ll base her on a lion fish ;D If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
